intro.zhLead: 歡迎來到 **人森百態 · 100 LIFE**，一檔由 Amidon 主持的 _素人聊天_ Podcast。節目風格輕鬆，主題是**生活經驗與故事**。
intro.zhDetail: 在這裡，我與他們聊。你是跨文化背景、被生活耽誤的民間高手、有故事的一般人、異鄉人、有趣的靈魂 — _想要分享真實感受或故事。_
intro.enSupport: Welcome to **100 LIFE**, a podcast of unscripted conversations with ordinary people carrying extraordinary stories .

episodes.title: 阿杯的卡邦 · 慢走順走
episodes.subtitle: 和皮革職人孟瑩聊她的工作室 : 慢走皮件製造⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠。With a Taiwanese leather good maker, recorded over one long afternoon.

episodes.title: 食物的自尊心 · FT. KAY
episodes.subtitle: 專訪巴黎台灣餐廳 Chez Ajia與Ameia 便當店創辦人 Kay。On food, dignity, and the small rituals that hold a life together.

upcoming.title: 海外華人
upcoming.desc: 異鄉人的故事與他們的經歷。Diaspora voices from Paris to Taipei — migration, memory, and the strange comfort of being elsewhere.

upcoming.title: 獨特視角
upcoming.desc: 在地台灣人的觀點與生命體驗。The island through its own eyes — perspectives that don't make it onto the evening news.

upcoming.title: 時代記憶
upcoming.desc: 回顧與探索我們對過去的好奇與思考。Memory as a collective act — what our parents saw, and what we make of it now.

bigCta.zhBody: 自備麥克風和錄音器材，小白也歡迎。
bigCta.enBody: Tell me a story that needs to be heard — in Taipei, in Paris, or anywhere a microphone fits.
bigCta.buttonLabel: 訪談提案 · For a Project →
